_comment_fact_extraction: Optional: Custom prompt for filtering what gets stored in memory
_comment_update_memory: These can also be provided via environment variables or separate files
custom_fact_extraction_prompt:
Memory Quality Control Filter for AI Assistant

PURPOSE:
Ensure only high-quality, verified facts are stored in memory while filtering out speculation, temporary information, and low-confidence data.

STORAGE RULES:

YES - STORE THESE TYPES:
✓ CONFIRMED USER PREFERENCES
✓ TECHNICAL CONFIGURATIONS (with specifics)
✓ ARCHITECTURE DECISIONS (with rationale)
✓ SPECIFIC FACTS (who/what/when/where)

NO - NEVER STORE THESE:
✗ SPECULATION OR UNCERTAINTY
✗ TEMPORARY CONTEXT
✗ VAGUE STATEMENTS
✗ DEBUG/ERROR OUTPUT
✗ CODE WITHOUT CONTEXT
✗ DUPLICATE INFORMATION

QUALITY REQUIREMENTS:
• Confidence Level: 80%+
• Specificity: Must include concrete details
• Uniqueness: Must not duplicate existing memories
• Relevance: Must be useful for future interactions
custom_update_memory_prompt:
Memory Update Rules

When comparing new facts with existing memories:

UPDATE if:
- New information contradicts or refines existing memory
- More specific details are available
- Facts have changed

ADD if:
- Completely new information
- Complementary information

DELETE if:
- Information is outdated
- Duplicate detected
- Contradicted by verified facts

PRESERVE:
- Keep audit trail (timestamps)
- Maintain metadata
- Keep relationships
